title: BYOVD (Bring Your Own Vulnerable Driver) detection now in Managed EDR
summary: Huntress Managed EDR now flags when Windows blocks a known vulnerable driver — a common precursor to attackers disabling endpoint security tools before deploying ransomware or moving laterally.
why_it_matters: BYOVD is one of the top techniques attackers use to evade EDR. Catching it early means you see the prep work before the payload, not just the smoking crater after.

title: Google Workspace student OU exclusions for ITDR
summary: K-12 and higher-ed partners can now exclude Google Workspace student organizational units from ITDR billing and detection — only staff and faculty identities count toward coverage.
why_it_matters: Education clients no longer pay to watch student accounts that don't represent meaningful risk. Pricing follows the staff/faculty count that actually matters.
